name: open-multi-agent
desc: TypeScript AI agent orchestration framework with dynamic workflows. Describe the goal, not the graph: a coordinator plans the task DAG at runtime and runs it on any LLM (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, or local models).

name: deepseek-pp
desc: DeepSeek Web browser extension: AI agent workspace with MCP tools, memory, Skills, automation, web search, and conversation export.

name: WrenAI
desc: GenBI (Generative BI) for AI agents, an open-source, governed text-to-SQL through an open context layer that turns natural-language questions into trusted dashboards, charts, and SQL across 20+ data sources, such as BigQuery, Snowflake, PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Amazon Redshift, Databricks and more.

name: stash
desc: Shared memory for your team's coding agents

name: pydantic-ai-harness
desc: Batteries for your Pydantic AI agent.

name: sutando
desc: My AI Stand. Realtime by day, rewriting itself by night. Summon my AI superpower.

name: ai-agent-book
desc: 《深入理解 AI Agent：设计原理与工程实践》（李博杰 著）开源主仓库：全书正文、编译版 PDF 与按章配套代码

name: agents
desc: A framework for building realtime voice AI agents 🤖🎙️📹

name: kody
desc: Your assistant's home — the memory, keys, code, and automations your AI agent keeps, portable across every MCP host. Built on Cloudflare Workers.

name: edgeever
desc: Serverless, 100% free, and open-source Evernote alternative on Cloudflare with native MCP | 无需服务器、0费用、原生支持 AI Agent 的开源自托管『印象笔记』
